models.purpose: Default local chat model for balanced reasoning, coding, and multilingual use.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 16 GB unified memory or higher; excellent fit for M4 Max.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 4.7 GB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Good default latency and quality balance. Uses Apple Silicon acceleration through Ollama on macOS.

models.purpose: Fallback chat model for fast startup, low memory use, and degraded-mode operation.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 8 GB unified memory or higher.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 2.0 GB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Fast and reliable fallback when larger models are unavailable or the USB is slow.

models.purpose: Embedding model for document and knowledge-base indexing.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 8 GB unified memory or higher.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 300 MB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Small embedding model suitable for offline AnythingLLM document workflows.

models.purpose: Optional higher-quality chat and coding model for M4 Max systems.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 32 GB unified memory or higher; 48 GB+ preferred for multitasking.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 9 GB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Stronger answers than 7B with slower load and response latency. Good M4 Max candidate.

models.purpose: Optional general-purpose model with strong ecosystem compatibility.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 16 GB unified memory or higher.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 4.7 GB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Good alternate default when Qwen behavior is not desired.

models.purpose: Optional reasoning-focused model for complex analysis on high-memory Apple Silicon systems.
models.ram_guidance: Recommended 32 GB unified memory or higher; 48 GB+ preferred.
models.disk_usage: Approximately 9 GB in Ollama model storage.
models.performance_notes: Reasoning workloads are slower but useful on M4 Max. Keep fallback model installed.
